omission_reason: Supabase Auth identity and server timestamps do not exist in the credential-free repository mirror.

rows.description: A 49-owner, rights-verified blind audit of machine-screened Flickr search hypotheses. Human outcomes are not pre-populated.

sampling_plan.qualityEstimationBlockedReason: Workflow controls may assess reviewer handling but cannot estimate biological population quality.
